title: ERROR 500: Upload images from my PC via postman request

posts.author: SerhiiDiukarev (Serhii)
posts.cookedHtml:
variables[file]:@/Users/serhiidiukarev/Desktop/20190527_164158.jpg
query:mutation ($file: File!) { add_file_to_column(file: $file, item_id: 571979072, column_id: "files") { id } }

Screenshot 2020-05-19 at 17.22.481645×999 107 KB

whole response from the server:

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Serhii,

I noticed you’re sending a GET request. Please send a POST request (all requests to our API should be POST) and it should work.

posts.author: SerhiiDiukarev (Serhii)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, it is still the same

Screenshot 2020-05-20 at 11.06.091647×694 83.5 KB

posts.author: SerhiiDiukarev (Serhii)
posts.cookedHtml: Found the reason. This topic can be closed!

posts.cookedHtml: Awesome to hear! What was the issue?

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
